name: Long-horizon delayed lethal 002
objective: Preserve board and battle sequencing until a safe lethal push is available.

avoid: premature end phase when battle setup is available

successConditions: Player 0 converts setup into lethal or a dominant LP delta.
failureConditions: Player 0 misses the turn where pressure should become lethal.
notes: Tests identifying the correct turn to pivot from development to damage.

scoring.rationale: Rewards timing the switch from setup to lethal pressure.
